required_preferences.fact: Takes public transit to campus exclusively — cycling and walking are prohibited due to her wrist fracture and physical therapy restrictions, regardless of weather or other conditions

supersedes.fact: Alternates between cycling and walking to campus each morning to increase aerobic exercise while reducing exertion on days with migraine or high blood pressure symptoms — public transit is now avoided unless severely unwell or weather is dangerous

required_preferences.fact: Relies on a mix of quick pre-made meals and batch cooking on alternate weeknights; Sunday meal prep is now skipped due to family relocation needs

supersedes.fact: Meal preps lunches and dinners every Sunday night for the week — never buys pre-made meals

required_preferences.fact: Communicates primarily through WhatsApp — never uses email for family matters
Reviews her color-coded planner each night before sleep to update deadlines and commitments
Replies to student emails in batches twice a day; avoids instant responses to preserve focus
Blocks early mornings for field specimen collection to comply with new daytime-only research protocols — avoids midday due to sun exposure and migraine risk

persona: A first-generation college student pursuing a master's in biology
